work_unit: MONI-PY-004: agent action whitelist bypass — complete kwargs whitelist + fail-closed filter
situation: audit-2026-07-07-029 found _ACTION_KWARGS_WHITELIST in api.py:1403 missing entries for 8 actions (place_order, cancel_order, set_data_source, update_settings, delete_rule, delete_strategy_session, evaluate_rules, advance_trade_date). _filter_action_args fallback returned unfiltered raw args when action not in whitelist → parameter injection via **args expansion. place_order most critical: OrderRequest(**args) accepts arbitrary fields.
action: Added whitelist entries for all 8 missing actions with exact kwargs matching engine method signatures. Changed _filter_action_args from fail-open (return raw args) to fail-closed (raise HTTPException 400 for unrecognized actions). Defense-in-depth: even actions that safely destructure args now have explicit whitelist entries.
outcome_evidence: Commit 682bda8 on auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870. Python syntax validated. Whitelist now covers all 19 dispatchable actions. Fail-closed filter rejects unknown actions with HTTP 400.
next_suggestion: Merge opt-local_simulator-1783352870 to main (5 commits: MONI-PY-001/002/003/005/004)
After merge, audit-cycle-state derived_fixes MONI-PY-004 → merged, then status → cycle-complete → next full audit

audit_findings.finding: _filter_action_args returned unfiltered raw args for actions not in whitelist (fail-open). 8 actions had no whitelist entry, allowing arbitrary kwargs injection via **args expansion to engine methods.
audit_findings.remediation: Added whitelist entries for all 8 missing actions; changed fallback to fail-closed HTTPException 400.
